scripts.predev: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='.next/dev/lock';if(!fs.existsSync(p))process.exit(0);try{const lock=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'));if(lock&&typeof lock.pid==='number'){try{process.kill(lock.pid,0);console.log('Next dev lock active for PID',lock.pid);}catch(e){if(e&&e.code==='ESRCH'){fs.rmSync(p,{force:true});console.log('Removed stale Next dev lock');}else{throw e;}}}else{fs.rmSync(p,{force:true});console.log('Removed invalid Next dev lock');}}catch{fs.rmSync(p,{force:true});console.log('Removed unreadable Next dev lock');}"
